axis_responsibility.Agent: This return is design-lead support evidence only, not approval or quality judgment.
axis_responsibility.Brick: The work contract is release v0.1.0 clean-repo preparation and AI-runnable onboarding docs.
axis_responsibility.Evidence: Proof should be temp output dirs and temp source copy gates, not standing project/ release contents.
axis_responsibility.Link: No Movement or route target is chosen here.
axis_responsibility.Support: Export verb, docs, dashboard bake instructions, and checker pins live under support/ and README.

candidate_file_changes: support/onboarding/install.sh comment/example cleanup only if needed for the single working-example rule
checker_or_verifier_plan: Focused current pins: run install_script_lint and product_no_smith_residue.
New pin: add release_export_exclusion_pin in support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py, whitelist/dispatch it in support/checkers/check_profile.py, and include it in read_side_projection_boundary.
New pin RED: mutate a temp copy of release_export.sh to remove project/ from the exclusion list and require ProfileError.
Export proof: from a writable temp source copy representing HEAD, run support/onboarding/release_export.sh /tmp/<release-out>; assert no project/ and no brick_protocol.egg-info/ in output.

Exported-tree proof: in the exported tree, run bake_dashboard_data_json(), then PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all with no project/ present before bake/onboard-created evidence.
Full gate: in a temp source copy, bake first, then run check_profile.py --all and git diff --check.
returned.design_summary: Design the release prep as a support/onboarding export verb plus documentation and checker pins. Use support/onboarding/release_export.sh, not a new Python operator module, because this is an operator-facing packaging command parallel to install.sh and does not need to expand the public brick_protocol.support.operator import surface.
edge_cases: Dirty source worktree: because the verb exports HEAD, proof before merge should run from a temp source copy with a local temp commit or be run after merge.
No global git identity: export verb should set local output-repo identity or emit a clear failure signal before commit.
Existing output dir: reject unless empty to avoid mixing release contents.
project/ already absent: export verification should still pass.
support/dashboard/public/dashboard-data.json absent before bake: docs and proof must bake before profile gate.
Read-only or no temp directory: full profile/FIRE probes cannot run, as observed in this session.
invariants: Exported release tree contains no project/ and no brick_protocol.egg-info/.
Export ships without project/ scaffold; first onboard/building creates the vessel.
Export verb never pushes, tags, or contacts network.
Checker pin has a real RED mutation when project/ exclusion is removed.
Docs show expected output and failure signals, not only happy-path commands.
Dashboard bake output remains projection seed only and source_truth false.
One insightwavesmith working-example allowance only; all reusable commands use {OWNER}.
not_proven: No file edits were made in this read-only design pass.
Full --all gate was not proven because the environment cannot write checker fixture/temp paths.
product_no_smith_residue full FIRE probe was not proven because no usable temporary directory was available.
Export verb behavior is not proven until implemented and run in a writable temp output dir.
Clean exported tree checker gate with no project/ is not proven in this session.
Vercel, Docker host, Cloud Run, IAP, provider behavior, source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, and Movement authority are not proven.
observed_evidence: README has quickstart but no deploy section for Vercel-static versus Docker-realtime paths.
support/onboarding/install.sh is parametric with BRICK_REPO/BRICK_HOME, uses set -eu, main "$@" last-line anti-truncation, and currently contains extra insightwavesmith examples in comments.
support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md documents bake, Cloud Run/IAP, generic Docker, and bare Node; it does not yet present the requested two-button release deploy story.
support/dashboard/Dockerfile is two-stage node:22-slim and exposes port 8080; server/index.mjs requires NODE_ENV=production plus non-dev INGEST_SECRET for real POST /ingest.
quickstart/setup explain first Building execution but do not give command/expected-output/failure-signal for every operator step and do not include the status inbox watch-loop standard.
check_profile.py --help works only with PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity and exposes --repo, --profile, --all, --self-test.
run_install_script_lint observed green in this read-only session.
dashboard_export_packet observed source_truth false with a buildings list.
read_side_projection_boundary profile and product_no_smith_residue FIRE probes were blocked by this managed read-only environment because they need writable temp/project fixture space.

proposed_changes: Add support/onboarding/release_export.sh. It should require an output dir, export tracked HEAD contents, remove or exclude project/ and brick_protocol.egg-info/, verify both are absent, initialize a fresh git repo in the output dir, create one initial commit, and print remote/tag commands for v0.1.0 without executing push or tag.
Make the export verb fail closed for existing non-empty output dirs, missing git, non-repository source, unresolved HEAD, and post-export presence of excluded paths.
Have the export verb print source HEAD, output path, excluded paths, initial commit hash, and exact follow-up commands using {OWNER}/BRICK placeholders.

Update README.md with a Korean Deploy section: Vercel static photo mode = bake dashboard data, build dashboard dist, deploy static dist; Docker realtime = Dockerfile/server with NODE_ENV=production, INGEST_SECRET, optional IAP pointer to DEPLOY.md.
Normalize GitHub examples so only one working example line retains insightwavesmith/BRICK; all other commands use {OWNER}/BRICK.
Update quickstart.md and setup.md so clone, install, doctor, first Building, checker gate, dashboard bake, and inbox watch each have command, expected output line, and failure signal.
Add the operator-session standard as a local status inbox watch loop for project/brick-protocol/status/inbox after first onboard creates the vessel.
Update support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md to split static Vercel/photo mode from Docker realtime mode while preserving Cloud Run/IAP as the detailed authenticated Docker-host path.
Add a small checker pin for release_export exclusion: project/ must appear in the export exclusion list and a temp mutation that removes it must go RED.
relevant_current_structure: Release-facing docs are README.md, support/docs/references/quickstart.md, support/docs/references/setup.md, and support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md.
Existing onboarding shell style lives in support/onboarding/install.sh.

Existing productization checks are whitelisted in support/checkers/check_profile.py, implemented in support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py, and referenced by support/checkers/profiles/read_side_projection_boundary.yaml.
Dashboard bake surface is brick_protocol.support.operator.dashboard_export.bake_dashboard_data_json and writes support/dashboard/public/dashboard-data.json.
project/ is current local evidence/status only and is excluded from the public release tree.
returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No brick/*, agent/*, link/*, project/*, AGENTS.md, pyproject.toml, uv.lock, .git mutation.
No dashboard server/runtime behavior change required.
No npm/node execution in the worktree for proof; Vercel build commands remain documentation.
No push, tag, remote creation, scheduler, queue, retry runtime, provider SDK, or network checker behavior.
